system.description: When you turn to violence and it is up close and personal, regardless of whether you are using melee or ranged weapons, roll +Tough.

failure.value: If you are not In Jeopardy!, mark In Jeopardy! If you are In Jeopardy!, unmark it and take a Condition.

partial.value: Deal 1 Harm OR gain an Edge OR, if you are not already In Jeopardy!, deal 2 Harm and mark In Jeopardy!

success.value: Deal 2 Harm OR deal 1 Harm and gain an Edge OR, if you are not already In Jeopardy!, deal 3 Harm and mark In Jeopardy!

critical.value: Deal 3 Harm OR deal 2 Harm and gain an Edge OR, if you are not already In Jeopardy!, deal 4 Harm and mark In Jeopardy!
